config.content.title: Delivery Policy
config.content.body: This Delivery Policy explains how Blackjack Halo provides digital access, account credits, and service updates through our online platform.
config.toc.items:
Digital Delivery|Blackjack Halo delivers all services digitally through web and mobile experiences.
Account Credits|Successful deposits are generally reflected quickly, though some payment methods may take longer.
Rewards and Payouts|Verified winnings or promotional credits are processed according to the relevant rules and account status.
Promotional Bonuses|Bonus delivery timelines vary by offer and are governed by specific campaign terms.
Service Availability|The platform is designed for continuous access, with occasional maintenance windows announced in advance.
Support Escalation|If a service or credit is delayed, contact support with your account details for a manual review.
